title: Hardware I/O
description:
Hardware I/O

Hardware I/O

There are 24 DC inputs and 16 DC outputs on a standard controller.

By purchasing I/O boards, you can add additional inputs and outputs. You can expand the I/O by using the Fieldbus I/O master option and Fieldbus I/O slave option. Also, you can input/output the Analog signal by using the Analog I/O board option. Refer to 11. Inputs and Outputs for details.

NOTE:  I/O boards cannot be added to T series and VT series manipulators.
